THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOUGHTON, MALVIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HOUGHTON, LARRY $973.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $973.00, FOR REPAYMENT OF $600.00 LOAN, PLUS BACK RENT, MINUS CABLE BILL PARTIAL PAYMENT.
